oshiSkill.name: みんな一緒にいくぞぉおっ
oshiSkill.description: [1/Turn]Choose 1 of your <Shirakami Fubuki> with mascot attached. During this turn, the chosen holomem gets Arts+20.

spOshiSkill.name: マスコッツ、アッセンブル!!
spOshiSkill.description: [1/Game]Reveal 1~2 mascots from your deck, and add them to hand. Then, shuffle the deck.

skills.name: 今日もあなたのそばに -フブキ-

name: Shirakami Fubuki
collabEffect: 白上のとこにおいでー : If you went second and it is your first turn, reveal 1 mascot from your deck, and add it to hand. Then, shuffle the deck.

name: Shirakami Fubuki
collabEffect: いっちにー、さんしー : Choose your center holomem. During this turn, the chosen holomem gets Arts+10.

name: Ari Yori no Alligator
ability: The holomem this mascot is attached to gets +10 HP.◆Additional ability if attached to <Shirakami Fubuki> When this holomem downs your opponent's holomem, send the top card of your cheer deck to your holomem.Only 1 mascot can be attached to each of your holomem.
